page_metadata.biotools__summary: A web service for streaming slices of 3D volumetric data, most notably the electron density data available in the Electron Density Server (EDS) and electron microscopy imaging data from the Electron Microscopy Data Bank (EMDB).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A web service for streaming slices of 3D volumetric data, most notably the electron density data available in the Electron Density Server (EDS) and electron microscopy imaging data from the Electron Microscopy Data Bank (EMDB).
